remaining_tasks.name: Finish discuss-phase Area 4 (composition model)
remaining_tasks.progress: Option A2 (src/connectors/ module) recommended, awaiting Pete's pick

remaining_tasks.name: Discuss Areas 2+3 (data shaping + error handling) in same pass
Cross-AI review with Gemini before planning

decisions.rationale: Live and reachable from Claude Code terminal (probe 1c confirmed). Read-only enforcement at application layer required — connector exposes write tools.

decisions.decision: Gmail: Custom Node.js MCP server with OAuth (gmail.readonly + gmail.compose)
decisions.rationale: No Cowork native Gmail available. Docker gmail-mcp uses IMAP/SMTP with app password — exposes send capability, violates zero-trust. OAuth scopes make send structurally impossible.

decisions.decision: Gmail server: standalone repo (gmail-mcp-pete or pete-gmail-mcp), not inside second-brain
decisions.rationale: Decouples lifecycle. Server can be swapped for Anthropic native Gmail when/if it ships.

decisions.decision: Gmail tool surface: exactly 3 tools — list_recent_messages, get_message_body, create_draft
decisions.rationale: Minimal surface. VIP filter baked into server logic. No labels/modify/threads/attachments/search.

decisions.decision: OAuth credential storage: plaintext refresh token at ~/.config/gmail-mcp/credentials.json, chmod 600
decisions.rationale: Simple v1 approach. Risk documented in server README. No Keychain in v1.

decisions.decision: OAuth client: Pete's personal Google account, consent screen in Testing mode
decisions.rationale: Sole user. Avoids Connor Advisors workspace approval friction.

decisions.decision: GitHub: Docker MCP (already wired, no Phase 3 connector work needed)
decisions.rationale: mcp__MCP_DOCKER__* tools are live. Phase 3 work is data shaping for /today, not wiring.

decisions.decision: Scheduling: Hybrid (Option 3) — manual/session-start primary, no headless cron in v1
decisions.rationale: Cowork native Calendar won't work headless. Headless cron deferred to Phase 4 enhancement.

decisions.decision: Gmail failure mode: single attempt, log on failure, degraded briefing with warning. No retry storms, no dead-letter queue.
decisions.rationale: SCHED-02 contract. Same for Calendar failures.

next_action: Resume discuss-phase Area 4: Pete picks between A1 (extend briefing-helpers.js) or A2 (new src/connectors/ module). Then discuss Areas 2+3 together. Then write 03-CONTEXT.md + 03-DISCUSSION-LOG.md.
context_notes: Discuss-phase is mid-flight. Area 1 (connector approach) fully resolved with 5 probes (1a-1d + scheduling). Area 4 (composition model) presented two sub-options — A1 extend briefing-helpers vs A2 new connectors/ module. Recommendation is A2. Areas 2 (data shaping) and 3 (error handling) not yet started — Pete wants them in one pass. Pete also requested cross-AI review with Gemini before planning. Gemini CLI needs re-auth (gemini auth login) — flagged in prior sessions.
